proposition: Mindee app s.r.o. (IČO 06437877) is a majority-owned subsidiary of Able.cz s.r.o.: Able.cz held 50 % at its 2017 founding, 47.5 % during 2019–2024, and 95 % since 5 May 2024 (Radek Hübler holds the remaining 5 %). Tomáš Melichárek has been its jednatel since founding (2017); Václav Faraga was added as jednatel on 2 May 2024.
shortTitle: Mindee app s.r.o. (IČO 06437877) is a majority-owned subsidiary of…
statusExplanation: Přímo doloženo primárním/oficiálním zdrojem (např. přímý výpis rejstříku nebo zakládaná listina).
note: The mirror-based pass recorded only Faraga's 2024 jednatel role and missed that the company is Able.cz-owned outright — a materially different fact. Consistent with the 1,430 tis. CZK 'Podíly - ovládaná osoba' line in Able.cz's filed FY2024 balance sheet.
